titleStmt.title: SII 16.176: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 176. (A.R. No. 379 of 1904.) KALAMAḶḶA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the left side of the entrance of Chennakēśava temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Pushya ba. 6, Monday regularly corresponding to 1550 A.D., December 29, °35.
This incomplete inscription registers a gift to god Chennakēśava of Kalumaḷa by Chāṅgalamaṟṟi Paruvatayya, son of Vipravinōdi Vallabhayya. The details of the gift are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
varṣaṁbulu 1472 Agunēṭi sādhāraṇa saṁvatsara
puṣya ba 6 sō śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi bra(ṁ)hmāṁḍa
nāyakulaina kalumaḷa śrīcannakēśavamūrttiki
śrīmadyajanādiṣaṭkarmaniratulaina bhūsurōttama
priyaśiṣyuṁḍaina vipravinōdi vallabhayya koḍku
cāṁgalamaṟri paravatayya daṁḍaṁ samarpiṁci
[Iccina dharma]śāsanaṁ śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvamahārāyalu pṛthvī
sāmrājyaṁ śāyaṁgānu tama vipravinōdulakallā
nu yī kalumaḷlagrāmaṁ brāṁhmalu Icchābhōjana
tāṁbūlavastrabhūṣaṇagaṁdhapuṣpavastuvāhanādulu mō
dalaina tyāgasarvamānyamunnu mā kulasvāmulaina kēśavayya gōpaji
yya nallārayya pedaAnaṁtayya cinaAnaṁtayya
llayaṁgāri paravatayyaṁgāru mōdalaina vipravinōda The record is incomplete and stops abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 16.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
